Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Docs Panel

Right-side documentation panel with sticky header, props table, and live examples. Shown when .cf-workbench has the .has-docs class.

Full Docs Panel

Button Component

Usage, props, and story references.

v2.1

Overview

The Button communicates a user action. Use the primary variant for the single most important action on a surface, outline for secondary actions.

Props

NameTypeDefaultRequired
labelstring—Yes
variantprimary | secondary | dangerprimaryNo
sizesm | md | lgmdNo
disabledbooleanfalseNo
onClick() => void—No

Stories

  • Button / Primary
  • Button / Secondary
  • Button / Disabled
  • Button / Sizes

Accessibility

Always use a meaningful type attribute (button, submit, or reset). For icon-only buttons, add aria-label.

The docs panel sits in the third column of .cf-workbench.has-docs. Its sticky header stays visible while scrolling long prop tables.

Toggle visibility with [data-cf-toggle-docs] — this removes .has-docs from the workbench and adds .is-hidden to the panel.

<aside class="cf-docs-panel">
  <div class="cf-docs-header">
    <h2 class="h5 mb-1">Button Component</h2>
    <p class="cf-muted small mb-0">Usage, props, and story references.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cf-docs-body">
    <h3 class="h6">Props</h3>
    <table class="cf-props-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Default</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr><td>label</td><td><code>string</code></td><td>—</td></tr>
        <tr><td>disabled</td><td><code>boolean</code></td><td>false</td></tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <h3 class="h6 mt-4">Example</h3>
    <div class="cf-doc-example">
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Primary button</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>

Doc Examples

Wrap live inline examples in .cf-doc-example. Provides a surface-2 background with subtle inset shadow.

Toggle Docs Panel

<!-- In the toolbar -->
<button class="cf-tool" type="button"
        data-cf-toggle-docs aria-pressed="true">
  <i class="bi bi-file-text"></i>Docs
</button>

<!-- components.js toggles: -->
<!-- workbench.classList.toggle('has-docs') -->
<!-- panel.classList.toggle('is-hidden') -->

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-docs-panelRight column, scrollable. Add .is-hidden to collapse.
.cf-docs-headerSticky header row with surface background. Stays pinned while body scrolls.
.cf-docs-bodyPadded content area for prose, props table, and examples.
.cf-props-tableFull-width table with alternating rows and monospace first column.
.cf-doc-exampleInset surface box for live component demonstrations.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
